title: Salted Butter Stovetop Delight
description: A sweet and crispy one-pot Russian dish featuring salted butter as the star ingredient, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Melt the salted butter in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add sugar and flour to the melted butter, stirring continuously until thickened and bubbly.
Reduce heat to low, add more oil if needed for smoother consistency.
Cook for about 1-2 minutes or until golden brown, stirring frequently.
Remove from heat immediately after adding oil to ensure a crispy texture.
